rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE JOHN C. OWENS TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Respondents Motion And Motion For Summary Judgment And/Or Summary Adjudication;
rulings.Rulings: Motion for Summary Judgment is granted. Petition is barred by Probate Code section 16061.8. In the alternative, Motion for Summary of Adjudication is granted as to the First, Second and Fifth Causes of Action.
